prompt: A crude childlike digital doodle made in a simple paint program on a white background, showing a close-up selfie-style scene with 1 main person in the lower left and center. The person has messy medium brown hair, a dark blue jacket over a pale skin-toned neck and chest, and oversized ski goggles or visor glasses with a bright rainbow lens band arcing across the eyes in red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple. The face is largely obscured by a large square beige blur or censor block centered over the middle of the head and upper torso. One pale hand is raised near the bottom center as if giving a thumbs-up or holding something close to the camera. Around the figure are simple black-outline background doodles: 2 small cloud shapes near the top, 1 large angled airplane or rocket-like shape in the upper right, 1 gray rounded standing object to the right of the person that resembles a rock, backpack, or bundled figure, and 1 tall white rectangular object at the far right with a yellow sun drawn near the top and blue zigzag scribbles below. Use rough uneven hand-drawn lines, messy coloring outside the lines, minimal shading, a naive children's drawing aesthetic, and low-detail playful composition.
